message: No action needed: PR #37816 (branch: aw/pnpm-lock-conflict-resolver) has no merge conflicts with main. After fetching and merging the latest upstream main (`git merge FETCH_HEAD`), git's ORT strategy auto-merged all files including `pnpm-lock.yaml` without any conflicts — `git status` showed "nothing to commit, working tree clean". The PR's `mergeable_state` of "blocked" is due to branch protection rules (e.g., required reviews or CI checks), not pnpm-lock.yaml conflicts. No pnpm-lock.yaml regeneration is needed.
